Description: Data from the HydroSHEDS version 1 database which is © World Wildlife Fund Inc. (2006-2022)
IRENA energy statistics dataset including generation, installed capacity, heat production, and related indicators
Global land cover data from the European Space Agency (ESA) WorldCover 2020 project
Raster of protected areas calculated using WDPA 2020. Data for the calculation of an indicator of the comprehensiveness of conservation of useful wild plants. Data in Brief
Cutout file for varying years for the country Zambia built using the ERA5 dataset.
Inflow files for varying years for the country Zambia extracted from GloFAS dataset.

Power plant data for Zambia covering existing and proposed plants. Two major categories are maintained: one with ERB 2023-2025 operational data for dispatch validation (KGL modelled as reservoir) and one with IRP and proposed plants for capacity expansion.
Year-indexed annual electricity import and export volumes (GWh) between Zambia and neighbouring SAPP countries (2020-2025) derived from ERB Energy Sector Reports.
